subject: Re: Security Audit Findings
content:
All,

Following up from the Quarterly Review earlier today. Here are the
action items:

- @Grace: Finalize the budget by Friday (target: 2/14)
- @Grace: Schedule the Incident Response review with Finance
- @Grace: Update the CI/CD Platform configuration per our discussion
- @Carol: Send out the revised Project Vanguard timeline by EOW

Next meeting: Friday at 15:00. Calendar invite to follow.

Thanks everyone,
Carol
--
Carol Garcia
Globex | Data Science Department
Phone: +1-944-176-3743 | Email: carol.garcia@globex.io

subject: Re: Security Audit Findings
content:
Hi Grace,

Thanks for the update. A few quick thoughts:

- Agreed on the Logging Service approach. Bob and I discussed this
during the Launch Retrospective and we're aligned.
- For the Engineering budget, I'd suggest we cap it at $299K for now and
revisit in Q1.
- The NPS score improvement looks promising — let's make sure we have
proper monitoring via CI/CD Platform before going live.

I'll update the Catalyst tracker accordingly.

Regards,
Carol
